{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = High Priestess of the Void (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine]] is addressed as the High Priestess of the Void by a shadow voice.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Deliver a message for me, High Priestess of the Void.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
